nodes.label: Windows Authenticode Signing
nodes.rationale: signtool.exe with certificate store or PFX via scripts/sign_windows.ps1; public-release smoke must pass verify_windows_exe.py --require-signed.

nodes.label: macOS Developer ID Signing and Notarization
nodes.rationale: Ad-hoc signing for local testing; public releases require Developer ID identity plus Apple ID/team/app-password notarization via scripts/sign_macos.sh, validated by verify_macos.sh --public.

nodes.label: Release Signing Rule
nodes.rationale: Unsigned artifacts acceptable for development and CI smoke tests; public GitHub Releases should include signed Windows/macOS artifacts, checksums, and SBOM files, gated by release_preflight and public_release_check.
